_comment: Static per-corridor news snapshot for offline/fixture mode. Read directly by engines/live_scores._news_signals (bypassing the live-path age filter, exactly like the GDELT snapshot). Sentiment is scored from the title+description against the keyword proxy in live_scores.py; the mix of risk vs de-risk tokens per corridor drives the differentiated news signal. Timestamps are illustrative — the fixture is treated as current-state, not time-filtered.

hormuz.title: Tanker seized near Strait of Hormuz as Iran navy raises alert
hormuz.description: A crude tanker was detained in the Persian Gulf amid heightened tension over Hormuz transit.

hormuz.title: Missile strike warning issued for Hormuz shipping lanes
hormuz.description: Insurers flagged a fresh threat to tankers after a reported drone incident near the strait.

hormuz.title: Iran conducts naval drills, tankers reroute to avoid Hormuz
hormuz.description: Escalating tension prompted several VLCCs to slow transit through the Persian Gulf chokepoint.

hormuz.title: Explosion reported aboard product tanker off Bandar Abbas
hormuz.description: A fire and blast damaged a vessel near the Strait of Hormuz; cause under investigation.

hormuz.title: Gulf crude premiums widen on Hormuz transit disruption fears
hormuz.description: Traders priced in a risk of partial closure as sanctions tension mounts around Iran.

hormuz.title: India monitors Hormuz situation as crude imports stay steady
hormuz.description: Officials said Persian Gulf shipments continue for now despite the naval standoff.

hormuz.title: Diplomatic talks aim to ease Hormuz tension after tanker incident
hormuz.description: Regional powers pressed for de-escalation to keep the strait open to tanker traffic.

bab_el_mandeb.title: Houthi drone attack hits cargo ship in the Red Sea
bab_el_mandeb.description: A missile and drone strike near Bab el-Mandeb forced a vessel to divert, raising Yemen shipping risk.

bab_el_mandeb.title: Second vessel struck off Yemen as Bab al-Mandab attacks resume
bab_el_mandeb.description: Shipping lines warned of renewed disruption after an explosion damaged a bulk carrier.

bab_el_mandeb.title: Red Sea transit halved as carriers suspend Bab el-Mandeb passage
bab_el_mandeb.description: Multiple operators suspended Red Sea routing after the latest Houthi threat.

bab_el_mandeb.title: Insurers hike war-risk premiums for Red Sea and Yemen waters
bab_el_mandeb.description: Underwriters cited sustained attacks near Bab el-Mandeb as a crisis for regional shipping.

bab_el_mandeb.title: Container ships reroute via Cape as Red Sea disruption persists
bab_el_mandeb.description: Sustained Houthi activity kept Bab al-Mandab shipping under warning.

bab_el_mandeb.title: Naval coalition steps up patrols in the southern Red Sea
bab_el_mandeb.description: Escorts were expanded near Yemen after the latest incident on the Bab el-Mandeb route.

malacca.title: Congestion builds at Singapore as tankers queue near Malacca
malacca.description: Heavy traffic slowed transit through the Strait of Malacca; no security incident reported.

malacca.title: Indonesia tightens inspections on shipping in the Malacca Strait
malacca.description: New checks on Singapore-bound tankers added delays along the corridor.

malacca.title: Piracy warning issued for vessels transiting Malacca
malacca.description: A reported boarding attempt prompted a security warning for Indonesia shipping lanes.

malacca.title: Coking coal shipments to India steady through Malacca
malacca.description: Bulk carrier traffic from Australia remained normal across the strait.

malacca.title: Malacca traffic returns to normal after brief weather delay
malacca.description: Transit resumed and lanes reopened following a squall near Singapore.

south_china_sea.title: China coast guard confronts vessels in the South China Sea
south_china_sea.description: A standoff raised tension along a key shipping route amid a fresh maritime incident.

south_china_sea.title: Taiwan strait tension flares as military drills expand
south_china_sea.description: Heightened activity near the Taiwan strait added a threat premium for regional shipping.

south_china_sea.title: Rare earth export licensing tightened, China signals curbs
south_china_sea.description: New restrictions stoked disruption fears for South China Sea magnet and mineral flows.

south_china_sea.title: Shipping advisory issued over South China Sea coast guard activity
south_china_sea.description: Operators were warned of possible boarding and inspection along disputed lanes.

south_china_sea.title: Solar module cargoes from China continue to Indian ports
south_china_sea.description: PV shipments across the South China Sea stayed on schedule despite the tension.

cape_of_good_hope.title: More tankers reroute around Cape of Good Hope to avoid Red Sea
cape_of_good_hope.description: Cape rerouting lengthened voyages as carriers steered clear of Bab el-Mandeb.

cape_of_good_hope.title: South Africa bunkering demand climbs on Cape rerouting surge
cape_of_good_hope.description: Longer hauls via the Cape of Good Hope boosted fuel stops off South Africa.

cape_of_good_hope.title: Weather delays some tankers off the Cape of Good Hope
cape_of_good_hope.description: A storm briefly slowed South Africa tanker transits before conditions eased.

cape_of_good_hope.title: Cape route capacity holds as diverted traffic normalises
cape_of_good_hope.description: Shipping around the Cape of Good Hope stabilised after the rerouting spike.

suez.title: Suez Canal transit falls sharply as ships avoid the Red Sea
suez.description: Egypt transit volumes dropped amid the Bab el-Mandeb disruption feeding the canal.

suez.title: Egypt weighs Suez tariff changes to retain shipping traffic
suez.description: Authorities floated a Suez tariff adjustment as diversions cut canal revenue.

suez.title: Suez Canal authority reports lower crude and LNG transit
suez.description: Egypt transit of energy cargoes slid as carriers chose the Cape route.

suez.title: Some carriers signal return to Suez as Red Sea risk is reassessed
suez.description: A few lines said they may resume Suez Canal transit if escorts hold.
